subcodes.first_line: The Most Great, Most Holy Tablet was revealed in eloquent Arabic. Now We desire to speak in the luminous tongue, and from the Truth, glorified be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح امنع اقدس بلغت فصحی نازل حال اراده آنکه بلغت نوراء تکلم نمائیم و از حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
